name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Pre DMZ Jump
notes: This Building Block identifies actions that may be seen within a DMZ jumping scenario.  It is used mainly by Anomaly: DMZ Jumping and Anomaly: DMZ Reverse Tunnel.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Pre DMZ Jump on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches all of the following BB:NetworkDefinition: DMZ Addresses
when the event context is Remote to Local
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Pre DMZ Jump on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:NetworkDefinition: DMZ Addresses
AND when the event context is Remote to Local
